response.justification: Bogdan brings 17+ years of broad engineering experience across distributed systems, full-stack development, and multiple languages, with recent AI-agent infrastructure work that aligns with the role's AI-first framing. However, the resume shows no evidence of experimentation platform engineering, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, rollout risk management, or growth-focused telemetry systems — which are the core technical competencies this Principal/IC6 role is built around. The high-throughput microservices work at Sociomantic demonstrates relevant scale experience, but it is in data integration rather than growth or measurement systems. There is also no indication of the cross-team platform ownership or organizational influence expected at the IC6 level.
strengths: High-throughput distributed systems experience at scale (millions of HTTP requests/second at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby)
Broad multi-language proficiency covering several of the required stack languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, C, C++, Java, C#)
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling work at re:cinq aligns with the AI-first engineering culture of the role
concerns: No experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management experience anywhere in the resume
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background; no mention of data analysis, statistical methods, or growth measurement systems
No evidence of Principal/IC6-level cross-team influence, multi-workstream ownership, or platform engineering adopted by other teams at scale

key_factors.factor: No experimentation or growth platform experience
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background
High-throughput distributed systems work at scale
